content.full_text:
January 2, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 "J" Street, Suite 800  
Post Office Box 807  
Sacramento, California 95804-0814  

Attention: Linda Cassidy  

Re: The Committee to Retain Judge Harry Papadakis  

Ms. Cassidy:

I am writing to confirm our conversations of December 27, 1989. As we discussed, the Committee has $2,878.51 left in savings. This amount has been designated toward the Judge's next re-election campaign.

Based on the foregoing, it is our understanding that these funds need not be disbursed and may be used for the Judge's next re-election campaign.

If any of the foregoing is incorrect, or if you need any additional clarification on this matter, please contact me immediately.

Thank you for your assistance in this matter.

Sincerely,

Marc E. Scott, C.P.A.  
Treasurer, The Committee to Retain Judge Harry Papadakis

MES:lkp  
cc: Judge H. N. Papadakis
